items.title: The Blazers have announced their Summer League roster, which features Yang Hansen and the two two-ways they currently have under contract, Jayson Kent and Chris Youngblood.
items.author: Sean Highkin
items.body_excerpt:
The Blazers have announced their Summer League roster, which features Yang Hansen and the two two-ways they currently have under contract, Jayson Kent and Chris Youngblood.

Gil Abraham, one of their player development coaches, will be head coach.
